cases.name: Pair formed, insert right
cases.scramble: U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are already paired together in the top layer. The pair is above the correct slot, oriented to go straight in with a simple trigger.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R'

cases.name: Pair formed, insert left
cases.scramble: U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are paired in the top layer, but the pair must be brought to the left side before inserting.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U F

cases.name: Pair formed, U2 then insert right
cases.scramble: U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Pair is formed but sitting at the back. Two U moves bring it to the insertion position.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Pair formed, U2 then insert left
cases.scramble: U2 F' U F
cases.recognition: Pair is formed but needs to be AUF'd twice to align for the left-side insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U2 F' U F

cases.name: Corner top white up, edge matched
cases.scramble: R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the top layer with the white sticker facing up. Edge is in the top layer with its stickers matching the two side colors. They are not paired.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R'

algorithms.label: Alt
algorithms.moves: F' U2 F U F' U' F

cases.name: Corner top white right, edge matched
cases.scramble: U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the U layer with the white sticker facing the R face. Edge is directly above the slot, colors matching.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner top white front, edge matched
cases.scramble: U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner is in the U layer with the white sticker facing the F face. Edge is in the top, colors aligned.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner top white up, edge flipped
cases.scramble: R U R' U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer, white facing up. Edge is in the top layer but flipped — colors are swapped relative to the faces.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U2 R U' R'

algorithms.label: Alt
algorithms.moves: F' U' F U2 F' U F

cases.name: Corner top white right, edge flipped
cases.scramble: U' R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing the R face. Edge is flipped. Pair must be formed before insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner top white front, edge flipped
cases.scramble: U F' U2 F U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing the F face. Edge is flipped. Requires setup before pairing.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U F' U2 F U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top, pair above wrong slot
cases.scramble: U R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are above a slot that isn't theirs. AUF brings them to the correct slot.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner U, white right; edge between slots
cases.scramble: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing right. Edge is between the correct and adjacent top-layer positions.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner U, white front; edge between slots
cases.scramble: F' U F U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner in U layer, white facing front. Edge in top layer in adjacent position.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner U, white up; edge correct orientation, wrong AUF
cases.scramble: U' R U2 R' U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner white facing up. Edge correctly oriented but requires AUF twice. Classic 8-move case.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U2 R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Corner U, white up; edge flipped, wrong AUF
cases.scramble: U R U' R' U2 F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner white up, edge flipped. Both need AUF to align. Diagonal case.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R' U2 F' U F

cases.name: Both in top, awkward diagonal
cases.scramble: R U2 R' U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner and edge are on opposite sides of the U layer. Requires setup moves to pair.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top, corner front-right; edge left-front
cases.scramble: F' U' F U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner above FR, edge above FL. Pairing requires a longer sequence.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U' F U' R U R'

cases.name: Both in top, right-back pair
cases.scramble: R U' R' U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner above BR, edge above FR. The longer path to pair them.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U' F' U F

cases.name: Both in top, white up, edge left
cases.scramble: U F' U F U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner white up above FR, edge is to the left. Needs two setup moves.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U F' U F U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Both in top, white right, edge back-right
cases.scramble: U' R U R' U2 F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner white facing right, edge at back-right position. Longest of the both-in-top group.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U R' U2 F' U F

cases.name: Both in top, white front, edge back-left
cases.scramble: U2 R U' R' U F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner white facing front, edge at back-left. Diagonal setup then standard insertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U2 R U' R' U F' U F

cases.name: Corner in slot correct, edge in top correct
cases.scramble: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is already in the correct slot. Edge is in the top layer and correctly oriented. The corner needs to be extracted to pair.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot correct, edge in top flipped
cases.scramble: R U R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in correct slot, edge in top but flipped. Extract and fix edge orientation.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot wrong orientation, edge correct
cases.scramble: R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the FR slot but oriented incorrectly (white not on bottom). Edge is in the top layer correctly oriented.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot wrong orientation, edge flipped
cases.scramble: R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in slot, wrongly oriented. Edge in top, flipped. Both need correction.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot, edge at back-right
cases.scramble: U R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the slot. Edge is in the top layer at the back-right position. Requires AUF before extracting.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot, edge at front-left
cases.scramble: U' F' U2 F U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner in slot. Edge is in the top layer at the front-left position.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U2 F U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in slot, edge back-right flipped
cases.scramble: U R U2 R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Corner in slot. Edge at back-right but flipped orientation.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U2 R' U' R U R'

cases.name: Corner in slot, edge front-left flipped
cases.scramble: U' F' U2 F U F' U' F
cases.recognition: Corner in slot. Edge at front-left, flipped.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' F' U2 F U F' U' F

cases.name: Corner in top, edge in middle correct
cases.scramble: R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is free in the top layer. Edge is already in the middle layer at the correct position, correctly oriented. Just insert the corner.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top, edge in middle flipped
cases.scramble: F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner is free in the top layer. Edge is in the correct position but flipped. Use a short trigger to fix.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top white up, edge in wrong slot correct
cases.scramble: U R U' R' U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Edge is in the middle layer but in the wrong slot, correctly oriented. Corner is in the top layer, white facing up.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U R U' R' U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top white right, edge in wrong slot
cases.scramble: R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer, white facing R. Edge in wrong slot.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top white front, edge in wrong slot
cases.scramble: F' U F U' F' U F
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer, white facing F. Edge in wrong slot.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: F' U F U' F' U F

cases.name: Corner in top, edge in wrong slot flipped
cases.scramble: R U2 R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner free in top layer. Edge in wrong slot and flipped. More complex extraction needed.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U2 R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top, edge in slot back-right
cases.scramble: U' R U R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top layer. Edge is in the back-right middle slot.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: U' R U R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in top, edge in slot back-right flipped
cases.scramble: R U' R' U2 R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in top. Edge in back-right slot but flipped.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U2 R U' R'

cases.name: Both in slot — corner correct, edge wrong slot
cases.scramble: R U' R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner is in the correct slot and correctly placed. Edge is in a different middle slot. Requires 11-move extraction and reinsertion.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'

cases.name: Both in slot — corner wrong orientation, edge wrong slot
cases.scramble: R U R' U R U' R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Corner in FR slot but misoriented (white sticker not on bottom). Edge in a different slot. Both pieces need extracting.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U R U' R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Both in wrong slots — extract and pair
cases.scramble: R U' R' U R U2 R' U R U' R'
cases.recognition: Both corner and edge are in middle slots but not the correct ones. Longest extraction case.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U' R' U R U2 R' U R U' R'

cases.name: Corner in slot flipped, edge in slot flipped
cases.scramble: R U R' U' R U R' U' R U R'
cases.recognition: Both pieces are in their respective slots but both wrongly oriented. Classic 'flip everything' case.

algorithms.label: Main
algorithms.moves: R U R' U' R U R' U' R U R'
